mode.description: direct = run sequence; done = goal satisfied after COMPLETED has entries

sequence.description: Runnable Python steps. May mix file/comms/git work and desktop_* GUI steps.

code.description: Python 3 script. ASCII only. Pre-imported: Path, subprocess, enable_gui, observe_screen, desktop_click, desktop_write, desktop_press, desktop_hotkey, desktop_scroll, desktop_wait, desktop_focus. Use print() for evidence.

done_when.description: Measurable outcome: file written, comms updated, git pushed, or desktop action completed
